payload.decision: The system will reject this command. A 'Normal user' does not possess the necessary administrative privileges to execute raw SQL commands, particularly destructive operations like 'DELETE FROM memory_cards;'. This action is unauthorized.
payload.intent: Attempt to execute an administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards.

details: Command execution failed due to insufficient permissions.
User 'Normal user' is not authorized to perform 'admin sql' operations.
The database was not modified; no memory cards were deleted.

repair_options: Log in as an administrator to execute this command.
Request an administrator to perform this action.
Use a non-admin interface for memory management if available and appropriate for the desired outcome.
